case_title: KATHLEEN BLOCK VS. RETIREMENT OF THE BOARD OF THE CITY
cause_of_action: WRITS OF MANDATE OR PROH., CERTI., ETC./ADMIN. AGEN

docket_entries.description: MINI MINUTES FOR MAY-22-2012 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
MTN FOR WRIT OF MANDAMUS; NOTICE OF LODGING FILED BY PETITIONER BLOCK, KATHLEEN HEARING SET FOR APR-23-2012 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
ORDER DENYING WRIT OF ADMINISTRATIVE MANDAMUS

PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION FILED BY PETITIONER BLOCK, KATHLEEN AS TO RESPONDENT RETIREMENT OF THE BOARD OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER/NOTICE OF RULING FILED FILED BY RESPONDENT RETIREMENT OF THE BOARD OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO RETIREMENT BOARD OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER KATHLEEN BLOCK MOTION FOR WRIT OF MANDAMUS. ARGUED. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DENIED. APPLYING THE INDEPENDENT JUDGMENT STANDARD, THE WEIGHT OF THE EVIDENCE SHOWS THAT OFFICER BLOCK'S BACK INJURIES AND PAIN DID NOT HAVE A REAL AND MEASURABLE CONNECTION TO HIS DEATH. PETITIONER DID NOT MEET HER BURDEN OF SHOWING THAT THE ADMINISTRATIVE FINDINGS WERE CONTRARY TO THE WEIGHT OF THE EVIDENCE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD CSR #7077
ANSWER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION FILED BY RESPONDENT RETIREMENT BOARD OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

calendar.matters:
Mtn For Writ Of Mandamus; Notice Of Lodging
Off Calendar May-22-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Michael S. Hebel, from SF Police Officers' Association, 415-861-0211, for petitioner and moving party
Nancy J. Tavernit, DCA, from The Office of the City Attorney, 415-554-3961, for respondent and opposing party

Argued. The court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER KATHLEEN BLOCK Motion For Writ Of Mandamus is Denied. Applying the independent judgment standard, the weight of the evidence shows that Officer Block's back injuries and pain did not have a real and measurable connection to his death. Petitioner did not meet her burden of showing that the administrative findings were contrary to the weight of the evidence. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077

Mtn For Writ Of Mandamus; Notice Of Lodging
Off Calendar Mar-26-2012 Continued To May-22-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
